case_for: Hopkins just posted 19.3 points in week 3, matching the pregame consensus projection and showing he can still deliver spike weeks as a clear target in his offense.
case_against: His volatility is extreme, with back-to-back sub-2-point duds in weeks 1 and 2 immediately preceding the week 3 breakout, showing a boom-or-bust profile that makes weekly floors unreliable.
